title: Deep investigation: centronias in Congress #21 debate

This is the smoking gun. Here is the complete picture:

## Root Cause: Race Between Commit and Service Restart

### Timeline

| Time (UTC) | Event |
|---|---|
| 19:17:42 | Commit `ba22c93` adds `congress: false` filter to `serve.py` |
| **20:36:28** | **Congress #21 starts** |
| 20:46:17 | Congress #21 finishes |
| **21:10:54** | `website.service` restarted (picking up the new `serve.py`) |

**The filter was committed at 19:17 but the service was not restarted until 21:10 — 79 minutes after...(truncated)
